no: The Drizzt Saga by Wes Weimer. BG1 quest mod adding Drizzt Do'Urden as a joinable NPC with custom areas. Use cn:0 (travel triggers) for EET — cn:1 (BGT worldmap) is not available. cn:3 (Delayed start) may fail pre-EET with missing translation @10006.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Drizzt Saga cn:2 (not in DB) raises XP cap to 3.75M via XPCAP.2DA — too low for an EET mega-install. EET Tweaks per-campaign caps are more flexible.
conflicts.source: Drizzt Saga tp2 comp #2 sets XPCAP to 3750000; cn:2 not in DB, 2026-03

dependencies.reason: Optional worldmap integration — install bp-bgt-worldmap after EET_End if desired

sum: Drizzt Saga for BG2EE and EET

co.n: The Drizzt Saga for BGEE/Tutu/BGT -> Default version: areas connected by travel triggers
co.no: Main component. Adds Drizzt quest areas connected via travel triggers. Required for EET — the worldmap version (cn:1) is BGT-only.
co.tp2n: Default version: areas connected by travel triggers

co.no: BGT-only worldmap component. Not available in EET.
co.tp2n: BP-BGT Worldmap version: all areas added to worldmap (requires BP-BGT Worldmap)

co.n: Delayed start: Drizzt joins after Durlag's Tower
co.no: Delays Drizzt's availability until after Durlag's Tower for better level-appropriate pacing. WARNING: May fail pre-EET with missing translation @10006 — works when installed post-EET.
co.tp2n: Delayed start: Drizzt joins after Durlag's Tower

co.no: Reduces the equipment Drizzt's companions carry to prevent item farming exploits.
Tones down the power level of Drizzt Saga's unique magical items for better balance.
Reduces XP rewards from Drizzt Saga creatures by 25% to prevent overleveling in BG1.
